hero.subtitle: Global Peace Initiative Switzerland
hero.title: Peace through {{highlight}}Vedic science{{/highlight}}
hero.description: We support Vedic Pandits in India who meditate and recite daily for world peace.

training.title: {{highlight}}Vedic Pandits{{/highlight}} working for peace
training.intro: These specialised meditators live in large groups in India and conduct daily programmes with scientifically measurable effects on collective wellbeing.

intro.p1: Thank you for your interest in supporting our peace initiative.
intro.p2: Your donation enables Pandits in India to continue their daily contribution to world peace.
intro.p3: Every contribution counts — from one-time gifts to monthly sponsorship.

bank.title: Donate by bank transfer — no fees

twint.title: Donate with TWINT
twint.fallback: No TWINT app? Donate online via RaiseNow
